must.title: Element has checkbox role
must.description: Use a native <input type="checkbox"> or an element with role="checkbox"

must.title: aria-checked reflects state
must.description: When checked: aria-checked="true". When unchecked: aria-checked="false". For tri-state: aria-checked="mixed"

must.title: Accessible label is required
must.description: Provide a visible label via <label>, aria-labelledby, or aria-label

must.title: Space key toggles state
must.description: When the checkbox has focus, pressing Space must toggle its checked state

should.title: Group checkboxes with group role
should.description: When presenting multiple related checkboxes, wrap them in an element with role="group" and aria-labelledby pointing to a visible group label

should.title: Visible focus indicator
should.description: The checkbox should have a clear focus ring, especially for custom styled checkboxes

should.title: Validation error linked to checkbox
should.description: If the checkbox has a validation error, use aria-describedby to link the error message to the checkbox

avoid.title: Using div/span without role
avoid.description: Don't build checkboxes from non-semantic elements without role="checkbox" and proper keyboard handling

avoid.title: Hiding the native checkbox without replacement
avoid.description: Don't use display:none or visibility:hidden on a native checkbox without providing a fully accessible custom replacement

react.label: React Checkbox

html.label: HTML Checkbox Group
html.code:
<fieldset>
  <legend>Preferred contact methods</legend>
  <label><input type="checkbox" name="contact" value="email" /> Email</label>
  <label><input type="checkbox" name="contact" value="sms" /> SMS</label>
</fieldset>

tests.title: Keyboard Toggle
steps: Verify checked/unchecked state changes visually and programmatically

tests.title: Screen Reader State Announcement
steps: Verify label, role (checkbox), and state (checked/unchecked) are read aloud
Toggle and verify the new state is announced
